behavior: Every confirmed actionable duplication and DRY violation under crates has one canonical owner, obsolete copies are removed, and maintained production and test sensors prevent recurrence.
revision_scope: Verified working tree based on the recorded revision for the final Milestone 10 commit.
retained_intentional_repetition: Serialized field names, SQL columns, and provider payload keys remain explicit protocol contracts.
Source-specific selectors and parsing taxonomies remain local where matching semantics differ.
Platform-parity implementations and migration, integrity, file-backed, or minimal-schema tests retain setup that is itself under test.
Public facade and trait methods remain explicit where they preserve separate API contracts.

commands.relevant_result: The complete local gate passed, including 821 script tests, 2,937 frontend tests across 248 files, production and Storybook builds, the browser smoke budget, SQLx metadata, and Rust verification.
commands.caveat: The environment doctor reported that the host Node and npm versions differ from the repository-owned baselines; all checks still passed.

commands.relevant_result: All workspace unit, integration, and documentation tests passed with optional features enabled.
commands.caveat: Tests carrying explicit repository-owned ignore reasons remained ignored.

commands.relevant_result: Maintained crates production and test scopes each report zero duplicated lines and zero clone regions; both baselines are ratcheted to zero.
commands.caveat: The detector threshold is 15 significant lines, so completion also included exact-string, symbol, forwarding-wrapper, policy-owner, and test-setup sweeps below that threshold.

commands.relevant_result: The required workspace clippy lane passed with warnings denied.
commands.caveat: The command covers the repository-owned production clippy policy; stricter all-target test linting is tracked separately.

commands.relevant_result: The standard workspace unit, integration, and documentation test lane passed.
Frontend boundaries and the Rust repository ownership graph passed.
Security sensors and the secret scan passed after shared prompt-injection and secure-storage policy consolidation.
Harness state, architecture, workflow policy, and file-size coverage passed.
Every governed source and configuration file remained within its hard limit.
commands.caveat: Review-threshold candidates remain advisory and governed by the existing file-size contract.

commands.relevant_result: SQLx offline metadata passed after two obsolete interview-query cache entries were removed.
The final working diff contains no whitespace errors.
